title: Fluffy Eastern Flatbread
description: A delicious flatbread originating from the Middle East, made with fluffy yeast dough. Perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add warm water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C) or a preheated grill to medium-high heat.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 2-3 equal pieces, depending on the size of flatbread you prefer.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush the tops with olive oil and place on a baking sheet or grill.
Bake or grill the flatbread for 2-3 minutes, or until puffed and lightly browned.
Serve warm, topped with your favorite herbs or spices.
